title: Ad Buy Form Extraction v1
description: Raw, source-faithful extraction from a visually rich advertising order, contract, invoice, credit memo, or request form. Every property is required in JSON; absent or illegible source values must be null.

property.description: Broadcast station or media property the buy is for. Prefer an explicitly labeled Station or Property value. Otherwise prefer the legal station/entity printed beside the postal address over a logo, market label, network affiliation, or call sign. Use a call sign only when no better name is printed. Do not use a national rep-firm letterhead (for example Katz) when a station call sign or Station field is present. Return null when absent.

tv_address.description: Document postal address only. Use the printed street address even when it sits under a rep-firm or agency letterhead rather than beside the station name. Exclude the station or company name, logo text, market label, network affiliation, and call sign. Collapse line breaks to single spaces; otherwise preserve source wording. Return null only when no postal address is printed.

advertiser.description: Advertiser, candidate, campaign, committee, or organization purchasing the advertising. Organization name only — exclude street address, city/state/ZIP, and phone numbers printed under the name.

agency.description: Advertising or media-buying agency name only. Do not substitute the advertiser. Exclude street address, city/state/ZIP, and phone numbers printed under the agency name.

product.description: Product, campaign, issue, or advertised subject shown in the product field.

contract_num.description: Underlying media-buy identifier as source text. Use an explicit Contract #; otherwise use an explicit Order #. Do not use an Invoice #, even when it is the only identifier shown. Keep the selected value as a string so leading zeros are preserved.

flight_from.description: Overall campaign or contract start date exactly as shown. Do not convert formats.

flight_to.description: Overall campaign or contract end date exactly as shown. Do not convert formats.

gross_amount.description: Explicit Gross Amount, Contract Amount, or Grand Total on an order or contract, exactly as printed. For a credit memo, use the explicit credit amount including sign or parentheses. Do not substitute Net Total, Invoice Total, a line-item subtotal, or a calculated sum.

line_items.description: One object per visible schedule or program row, in document reading order. Use an empty array when no line items are present.

channel.description: Station, market, feed, or call-sign style channel for this schedule row when that concept is printed (for example WFRV, Flint (WSMH), or 3). Do not use revision/makegood codes, daypart-only text, program names, rates, or spot counts. Return null when the row has no channel/station column.

program_desc.description: Program, daypart, spot, or schedule description for this row.

program_start_date.description: Start date printed in an explicit date cell on this schedule row. Do not use overall Flight dates, week-band column headers (for example 5/19 - 5/19), or spot-count cells under those headers.

program_end_date.description: End date printed in an explicit date cell on this schedule row. Do not use overall Flight dates, week-band column headers, or spot-count cells under those headers.

sub_amount.description: Row-level subtotal or amount exactly as printed. Return null if the row has no explicit amount.
